5/15/26

UGA

new update every monday

UGAify

A new tool to annoy your teachers. Drag the link into your bookmark bar, then click to turn almost any site to UGA.

- Try it out on google.com

Summer updates

There will likely be one large update that re-organizes the site, and adds a few features. But don't expect too much. (unless Equinox locks in)

Gąmes / Pröxies

Broken? Try something else or check out Downloads.

Downloads

(Unzip and run index.html)

(Unzip and run main.py, goto http://localhost)

(Unzip and run main.py, goto http://localhost)

Guides

All we have is cloaxer rn

Cloaxer

Cloaxer is for about:blank cloaking tabs.
This makes them harder to be dyknow(ed) and blocked. It works on almost everything but products from big companies (Google, Microsoft, etc.)
Instructions: Enter your link below and press enter or click "Cloak"

?ErrorMessage?

Bookmarklets

Drag the link into your bookmarks bar (Check settings to show if you can't see it) Then click to run (works on virtually any site)

UGAify (new!) Adblocker Stats.js Asteroids Piano History Flooder Tab Cloaker X-Ray Goggles (View and mess with the page)

Info

v1.2f - 5/29/2026

Made by ddddd-dbase (UGA dev 2)

Fork by Equinox

Email: loverofelpotatos@gmail.com

No AI used! :D

Changelog

Link fixes will not be included

v1.2.1 - 6/15/2026

  • Added UGAify
  • Added title info bar
  • Changed text highlight color
  • Minor touchups

v1.2f - 5/29/2026 (Fork-Specific Release)

  • Added bookmarklets window
  • All refactoring done
  • Minor design changes
  • Major backend changes
  • Improved Cloaxer UX

v1.1 - 5/11/2026

  • Particles.js background + toggle for it
  • A bit more info in random places
  • Bee Swarm Simulator downloadable
  • Renamed "Cloaxer" tab to "Tools"
  • You can now click outside tabs to close them (not just clicking on the tab again)
  • Time display
  • Hide home button toggle
  • Moved settings and suggestions into its own tab
  • Minor design changes

v1.0.1 - 5/5/2026

  • Added more info in various places
  • Fixed home button

v1.0 - 5/4/2026

  • Completely revamped UI
  • Update warning added
  • Changelog added
  • Fixed nothing

v0.2 - 4/27/2026

  • Coming soon added
  • Guides (coming soon) added
  • Splash texts added
  • Downloads added
  • Fixed font size on smaller screens

v0.1 - 4/20/2026

  • First version :O

Settings

Auto self-cloak on launch

(requires popups to be enabled)

Replace original tab

(Do note that cloaked links will not open in a new tab in cloaked form.)

Always show home button

(Reload to fix if broken)

Dynamic background (particles)

(Disabling this may improve performance)

Theme

(Reload the page to apply theme)

Suggestions

Got suggestions for UGA? Fill out the form below.

How to use downloadables

There are (in general) 3 different kinds of downloadables:

  1. Single-File

    This is the simplest type of download, you will get a single file with the .html extension. All you need to do is double-click it to open it in your browser

  2. Static HTML

    Another simple download, this one is just like the Single-File, but there will be more files. The one you're looking for is likely going to be named index.html

  3. Non-Static HTML

    This one is quite a bit more complicated. First off, make sure you have Python installed. Type Win+R, type "powershell", and click enter. Then, type "python --version". If this gives you an error, you don't have python installed. To install it, go to your start menu and find "Software Center", from there, find Python. (It might be titled "Python Suite", or something similar). Once you have Python, go to the downloadable and double click the file called "main.py". From there, all you need to do is go to your browser and type "localhost"
